projectOverview.title: IPL Match Winner Prediction
projectOverview.tagline: An ML experiment in predicting T20 cricket
projectOverview.description: This project builds a classifier to predict whether the team batting first wins an IPL match, using only pre-match features. After rigorous diagnostics and iterative feature engineering, the key finding is that T20 cricket match outcomes are nearly unpredictable from pre-match features alone.

researchNotice: The underlying match prediction model achieved 40.5% accuracy on IPL 2025, 0.425 ROC-AUC, worse-than-random performance on out-of-sample data. Simulation outputs are provided for educational and software engineering purposes and should not be interpreted as reliable forecasts.
